case_title: BESSIE P WONG VS. BART A HAWKINS et al

HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT BAR HAWKINS'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. BART A HAWKINS HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON, II; CLERK: D. LOK; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR #4280 (206)

MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SCOTT I. BASSIN, FOR PLAINTIFF BESSIE P. WONG
LISA FREITAS, LIMITED SCOPE ATTORNEY FOR DEFENDANT BART A. HAWKINS

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED AND RECITED ON THE RECORD AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT TO VACATE THE PROPERTY AT 7829 GEARY ST., #5, SAN FRANCISCO, BY 4-22-07. DEFENDANT TO PAY PLAINTIFF $4,000 FOR UNPAID RENT AT THE RATE OF $100 PER MONTH BEGINNING 5-1-07. IF DEFENDANT VACATES THE PROPERTY AND MAKES PAYMENTS TO PLAINTIFF, THE MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO FULFILL THE AGREEMENT, PLAINTIFF SHALL UPON EXPARTE REQUEST WITH 24 HOUR TELEPHONE NOTICE TO DEFENDANT, MOVE THE COURT TO HAVE JUDGMENT ENTERED FOR POSSESSION AND ANY UNPAID RENT WITH NOT STAYS OF EXECUTION. AFTER 4-22-07, ANY PERSONAL ITEMS LEFT AT THE PROPERTY ARE DEEMED ABANDONED. SECURITY DEPOSIT IS WAIVED.

TRIAL DATE IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR.

JUDGE PRO TEM: THOMAS DROHAN, CLERK: NANCY REGAS, COURT REPORTER: SUSAN LEE (218)
